meta.title: Châu 47 Tẩy Ố, Đánh bóng, Hàn kính xe Ô Tô Buôn Ma Thuột
meta.description: Châu 47 chuyên dịch vụ tẩy ố, đánh bóng, hàn kính xe ô tô tại Buôn Ma Thuột. Giá hợp lý - Dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp - Khách hàng hài lòng 100%.

hero.heading: Professional Automotive Glass Polishing
hero.subheading: Restoring absolute clarity to your vision. Advanced glass polishing technology for luxury vehicles.

about.heading: About Us
about.subheading1: At <bold>Châu 47</bold>, we understand that car glass not only affects aesthetics but also directly determines your visibility and driving safety. That's why our glass stain removal, polishing, and repair services were created — with the goal of delivering crystal-clear glass, safe driving, and a car that looks brand new.
about.subheading2: Located in <bold>Buôn Ma Thuột</bold>, Châu 47 makes it easy for customers across the <bold>Tay Nguyen</bold> region to access premium car care and detailing services.
about.subheading3: With experienced technicians, modern equipment, and glass-safe specialized compounds, we commit to:
about.subheading4: ✨ Effectively eliminating stains, cloudiness, and long-term water deposits.
about.subheading5: 🔒 Keeping glass surfaces safe — no scratches or damage.
about.subheading7: 💰 Fair, transparent pricing that matches the quality.

services.heading: Premium Services
services.subheading: Serving diverse needs from luxury personal vehicles to premium architectural projects.
services.card0_desc: Remove wiper scratches, mold stains, and water spots from all luxury vehicle glass surfaces.
services.card1_desc: Restore optimal visibility for heavy transport vehicles and long-distance buses.
services.card2_desc: Treat rock-chip cracks and prevent spreading — without replacing the glass.
services.card3_desc: Restore shine and clarity to long-tarnished building and villa glass facades.

specs.heading: Precision Engineering
specs.subheading: Our proprietary nano-ceramic process delivers measurable, certified results on every treatment.

slider.heading: See the Difference
slider.subheading: Drag the handle to compare glass clarity before and after our professional treatment.

testimonials.heading: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.t0_quote: I was truly impressed with the clarity after polishing. Driving at night feels much safer — no more glare at all.
testimonials.t1_quote: Professional service, technicians explained the glass condition very thoroughly. Results exceeded expectations — windshield completely clear.
testimonials.t2_quote: Reasonable price afor premium quality. Highly skilled technicians who are extremely careful with customers' cars.
testimonials.t3_quote: Not only did they clean the glass thoroughly, but they also guided me on how to care for it to prevent future staining. Very dedicated and professional!

cta.heading: Ready to Restore Crystal Clarity?
cta.subheading: Book your free inspection today and experience the difference of professional glass restoration.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q0: Does glass polishing make the glass thinner or brittle?
faq.a0: Our process only affects the micron surface layer to remove scratches. Glass thickness is reduced by less than 1% — well within engineering safety standards.
faq.q1: How long does the process take?
faq.a1: Depending on the severity and area of damage, the process typically takes 2 to 4 hours. We provide a precise estimate after the free inspection.
faq.q3: Can deep scratches be completely removed?
faq.a3: Scratches up to 0.3 mm deep can be fully eliminated. Deeper scratches are significantly reduced in visibility. Each case is assessed during the free inspection.
faq.q4: Should I polish glass at home myself?
faq.a4: DIY polishing with incorrect compounds or technique can permanently damage glass or distort vision. Professional equipment and certified compounds are essential.
faq.q5: Does the service come with a warranty?
faq.a5: Yes — all treatments are backed by a 12-month warranty against reappearing scratches within the treated area.
